comment: Cologne playoff (Champions stage) results. a/b = bo3.gg team1/team2 orientation; winner two-source verified (bo3.gg archive tid 4209 stage 9713 + Liquipedia final standings: Falcons champion, FURIA runner-up, Spirit/Aurora 3rd-4th); start = bo3.gg scheduled start, UTC. QF/SF are BO3, grand final BO5 (bo field). Consumed by calibration.py (cologne-playoffs) + postmortem_playoffs.py.
